items.title: Tasmania's association of retired police question minister over delay of trauma support trial

items.title: Author Randa Abdel-Fattah appears to abandon threatened defamation case against SA premier

items.title: Scam centres growing 'exponentially' despite Myanmar crackdown

items.title: Why more Australian men are choosing to be childfree
items.summary: About 15 per cent of Australian men say they don't want children, an increase from 11 per cent in 2005. Ian says his own childhood played a large part in his decision.
